cross_domain_bonus.rationale: All hypotheses bridge statistical mechanics (critical phenomena, universality classes, fractal geometry) and tumor immunology/pharmacology, spanning 2+ disciplinary boundaries (physics/mathematics -> cell biology -> immunology/pharmacology). Non-biomedical retrieval tools structurally underserve the statistical mechanics side.

ranked_hypotheses.title: LOX Collagen Crosslink Density Maps to Bond Occupation Probability, Creating a Sharp Percolation Phase Transition in T Cell Immune Exclusion
BAPN Dose-Response Predicts a Sharp Nonlinear Phase Transition in Immune Infiltration -- LOX Inhibitor as Percolation Control Knob
Universal Critical Exponent nu = 0.88 Predicts T Cell Clustering Length Scale Across Tumor Types Independent of Molecular Details
Chemotaxis Breaks Percolation Universality -- Directed T Cell Migration Shifts the System to Directed Percolation with Distinct Exponents
MMP/LOX Kinetic Balance Creates Dynamic Percolation, Generating Temporal Windows of Immune Infiltration in Tumors
Subdiffusive MSD Exponent alpha = 0.53 at the Percolation Threshold Is a Universal Diagnostic Fingerprint for ECM-Mediated Immune Exclusion

diversity_check.analysis: Top-5 spans five distinct mechanistic angles: static phase transition existence (H1), pharmacological threshold crossing (H4), cross-tumor universality (H2), framework boundary conditions / universality class (H8), and temporal dynamics (H6). H1 and H4 are related but not redundant (different experiments, different predictions). H2 and H8 are mutually exclusive predictions about the universality class, both scientifically necessary. No forced promotion needed.

pairs_with_high_similarity.similarity: H4 is the pharmacological operationalization of H1's framework
pairs_with_high_similarity.assessment: Connected but not redundant: different experiments (density scan vs. dose-response), different falsifiable predictions, different translational implications. Both selected.

elo_tournament.note: Identical ranking from both linear composite and Elo tournament. H1 (5-0) > H4 (4-1) > H2 (3-2) > H8 (2-3) > H6 (1-4) > H3 (0-5). The pairwise comparison captures a foundationality dimension: H1 is the prerequisite for H4, H2, H6; H4 is directly actionable; H2 tests the deep prediction; H8 and H6 are further from testability.
elo_tournament.implicit_dimension_captured: Foundationality / prerequisite structure: hypotheses that must be proven first before others can be tested score higher in pairwise comparisons, consistent with their higher composite scores.

evolution_selection.skip_condition_rationale: top-3 composites are 8.30, 8.10, 7.05 -- all above 6.5 so skip condition (top-3 >= 6.5) is technically met, but early-complete threshold (>= 7.0 for all top-3) is NOT met (H2 = 7.05 just barely above). Recommend Evolver run to strengthen H2 and address directed percolation contradiction with H8.

cycle2_instructions.H1: Address disordered lattice abstraction: can Voronoi/random geometric graph percolation recover the same universality class? Quantify heterogeneity smearing. Correct Wolf 2013 threshold (4 um^2 cross-section not 3 um pore diameter).
cycle2_instructions.H4: Correct Tang citation (1983 not 2017). Estimate p(dose) function shape for BAPN given LOX enzyme kinetics and MMP turnover. Assess whether cooperative LOX activity threshold produces spurious inflections.
cycle2_instructions.H2: Address directed percolation concern (H8): what exponent does Pe ~ 3 system actually use? Redesign test to measure the exponent rather than assume nu = 0.88. Consider whether the test can be done in vitro with known collagen densities.
